calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition To Compel Accounting By Attorney In Fact, For Declaratiion That Authority Of Attorney In Fact Is Revoked, And For Attorneys' Fees.
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for William Diggs. Jonathan McCurdy for Steven Payne (Petitioner).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Power of Attorney, capacity, management of property/rents and lack of an accounting. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court denied the petition without prejudice.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
